prompt:
STYLE-LOCKED ELEMENT: the attached reference image defines drawing style only.
Match stroke color/weight, paper texture, and sketch tone from the reference.
Do NOT redraw the reference object; create ONE new isolated object described below.

Written style notes:
- Render walls with thick, solid orange strokes about 6-7px wide.
- Use thinner interior lines and doors in medium gray with about 2-3px stroke.
- Depict double doors with two arcs in dotted dark gray lines.
- Use simple single arc swings for single doors in same style as interior lines.
- Apply textured, off-white paper tone background with subtle grain and speckles.
- Include small random black ink blotches and imperfections scattered across the background.
- Outline windows with parallel thin vertical lines in medium gray.
- Avoid shading or hatching; maintain flat, clean linework throughout.
- No furniture or additional symbols, focus solely on architectural elements.
- Employ consistent line weight contrast: thick for exterior, thin for interior and openings.

Element data JSON: {"id":"item-bed","type":"bed","label":"King Bed","x":110,"y":620,"width":220,"height":160}

Output constraints:
- top-down orthographic view
- object centered with plain light background (or transparent if supported)
- no text labels
- preserve approximate proportions from width/height fields
